articles.title: Mortgage application fraud risk fell 9.3% in Q1 2026
articles.summary: Cotality says fraud risk fell 9.3% year over year in Q1 2026 to 1 in 129 applications, as refinances reached 41% of volume.

articles.title: FICO appoints Eric Lapin to head Scores business
articles.summary: FICO named Eric Lapin to head Scores strategy and market intelligence as regulators expand mortgage use of FICO 10T and VantageScore 4.0.

articles.title: 'Disrupted or dead': AI is crushing a generation of startups built before ChatGPT
articles.summary: The AI boom that has funneled more than $250 billion into OpenAI and Anthropic has left hundreds of startups built before ChatGPT's arrival in 2022 stranded.

articles.title: Individual traders drove Kalshi’s rise. Now, it’s going for Wall Street
articles.summary: In a series of moves in 2026, the prediction market platform in the U.S. is working to make its event contracts more attractive to institutional trading.

articles.title: Rubio odds for GOP 2028 nominee close to overtaking Vance on Kalshi
articles.summary: Vice President Vance has seen his odds slip since the start of the year, as the secretary of State's chances have been buoyed by international conflicts.

articles.title: HouseMe.ai launches free AI listing reports for Toronto buyers
articles.summary: HouseMe.ai launched a free tool for GTA listings, delivering 0–10 valuation scores, true cost estimates and market pulse data in 30 seconds.

articles.title: Huntsville Realtors names Tiffany James CEO to lead ValleyMLS
articles.summary: HAAR named association veteran Tiffany James CEO. She will oversee ValleyMLS, serving nearly 5,000 North Alabama real estate professionals.

articles.title: Plaza Home Mortgage discloses data breach affecting customers, employees
articles.summary: Plaza Home Mortgage, a wholesale and correspondent mortgage lender, has disclosed a data breach due to a security incident that may have exposed customers' and employees' personal information.

articles.title: Berkshire Hathaway buys Taylor Morrison for $6.8 billion. Buffett touts Abel’s deal-making
articles.summary: The acquisition marks one of the first major strategic deals under Warren Buffett's successor Greg Abel, who took over as CEO in the beginning of 2026.

articles.title: Former Barclays CEO Jes Staley agrees to July 23 interview about Jeffrey Epstein by Oversight panel

articles.title: Two months, $2.6 billion: How NASA ETF turned SpaceX IPO access into a hot retail trade
articles.summary: With Elon Musk's SpaceX IPO ahead, retail investors are rushing into space-themed ETFs including NASA which offers direct access to the rocket company.

articles.title: Fed Governor Michelle Bowman warns against hiking interest rates because of inflation spike
articles.summary: Bowman said reacting to the inflation surge, driven primarily by energy prices and tariffs, has proven ineffective.

articles.title: CFTC sues Rhode Island over actions against prediction markets

articles.title: The wealthiest investors are pulling money out of the U.S. in the 'de-dollarization' trade

articles.title: New York passes Mamdani's pied-a-terre tax. Here's who pays and how much

articles.title: 'King of Cashmere' CEO on outperforming the luxury slowdown: Don't be greedy
articles.summary: Brunello Cucinelli's success is tied to its ethos of choosing long-term integrity over short-term margin chasing, CEO Riccardo Stefanelli told CNBC.

articles.title: Traders are skeptical of Iran timeline for Strait of Hormuz reopening

articles.summary: China’s industrial profits grew at their fastest pace in over two years in April, buoyed by stronger exports, higher producer prices and gains in upstream industries.
